nodes.name: Madeira firecrest
nodes.summary: Madeira firecrest（Madeira firecrest，学名 Regulus madeirensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于照葉林。

nodes.name: 照葉林
nodes.summary: 照葉林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Trocaz pigeon、波氏鸽、飯島柳鶯等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs mainly at higher levels from 600 to 1,550m (1,950–4,900ft) in all types of forests and scrub, but with a preference for tree heaths. It can also descend to lower areas after breeding. Although it is strongly adapted to endemic tree heaths, it also breeds in broom, Vaccinium, relict laurel forest, oak-dominated deciduous forest and stands of the introduced Japanese cedar, Cryptomeria japonica. It is absent from the alien eucalyptus and acacia plantations which have replaced much of the endemic Madeiran laurel forest
